summary: Iteration 11 - Complete testing of Rotation/Drag-to-move zone functionality. Backend: 7/7 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All new features verified working - Purple rotation handle (↻) appears above selected zone in edit mode, updated instruction text includes rotation and move info, zone selection shows blue border and red vertex handles. All previous features continue to work.

backend: GET /api/map-sessions?floor_id=... - Feb 17 session exists with zones
Zones have polygon_points array with x,y coordinates
Zone category changes still work (regression test)
Zone remove/restore toggle still works (regression test)
POST /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/zones - Create zone with polygon_points works
frontend: Login with admin@crowd.sa / admin123
Daily Sessions page loads at /daily-sessions
Feb 17 session selectable from calendar/session list
Edit mode button (MousePointer icon) activates correctly
Updated instruction text in edit mode shows: 'انقر على منطقة لتحديدها. اسحب النقاط لتعديل الشكل. اسحب المقبض البنفسجي ↻ للدوران. اسحب المنطقة لنقلها.'
Instruction mentions rotation (دوران) and zone move (نقلها)
Clicking zone in edit mode selects it with blue dashed border
Red vertex handles appear on selected zone corners
Purple rotation handle (↻) appears above selected zone with dashed line to zone
Rotation handle has correct properties: purple fill (#8b5cf6), dashed line, cursor:grab
Remove button (إزالة) appears when zone selected in edit mode
Double-click zone opens edit dialog (تعديل المنطقة)
Pan mode button works
Draw mode shows shape buttons (circle, rect, triangle)
Rect mode shows correct instruction
Zoom in/out/reset controls work
Zones tab shows 3 active zones with correct names and icons
Changes tab shows zone modifications summary
Calendar navigation (prev/next month) works
Session list shows 1 session with badge

seed_data_creation: Feb 17 session with ID '0a5aa22d-eb43-4967-8ca2-d08ad7077454' on floor '773f281e-ff1d-4983-b92b-6a50412dd547' has 3 active zones + 1 test zone marked as removed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested: Rotation/drag zone functionality. NEW features: 1) Purple rotation handle (↻ icon) appears above selected zone in edit mode - positioned at zone's topmost point with dashed purple line connecting to center. 2) Zone drag-to-move: clicking inside selected zone and dragging moves entire zone. 3) Rotation: dragging purple handle rotates all zone points around center. 4) Auto-save to backend on mouse release (PUT /zones with polygon_points). 5) Updated instruction text in edit mode explains all three editing capabilities. State variables: isRotating, isDraggingZone, dragZoneStart. Functions: getZoneCenter, rotatePoints, movePoints, getRotationHandle. The rotation handle has data-testid='rotation-handle'. Feb 17 session has zones: 1-0-1 (men_prayer), 2-0-1 (women_prayer), 3-0-1 (men_rakatayn).

rotation_handle.details: Purple rotation handle (data-testid='rotation-handle') visible above selected zone with dashed connecting line, purple fill (#8b5cf6), cursor:grab

instruction_text_updated.details: Edit mode instruction includes rotation (اسحب المقبض البنفسجي ↻ للدوران) and zone move (اسحب المنطقة لنقلها)

zone_selection.details: Clicking zone in edit mode shows blue dashed border and red vertex handles

backend_polygon_update.details: PUT /zones with polygon_points saves and persists rotation/move changes

remove_button.details: Remove button (إزالة) visible when zone selected in edit mode

double_click_dialog.details: Double-click zone opens edit dialog (تعديل المنطقة)

pan_draw_rect_modes.details: All toolbar modes work: Pan, Draw (with shape buttons), Rect, Edit

calendar_session_list.details: Calendar navigation and session list all working
